heading: Meetings
label: 22508 Meetings
text: The corporation may hold its meetings at any place the corporation decides.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2250836:94., .Feb. 24, 1925, ch. 303, § 443 Stat. 967
